item.title: 时隔四年，红色 iPhone 或回归
item.description:
According to Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman, Apple may introduce a dark red color as a "flagship model" option for the iPhone 18 generation. 据彭博社记者 Mark Gurman 报道，苹果可能会在 iPhone 18 这一代上推出深红色作为「旗舰机型」的配色。

🔗 Related Reading: Red iPhone Returns? (PRODUCT)RED and Apple's 20 Years of Ups and Downs 🔗 相关阅读： 红色 iPhone 回归？(PRODUCT)RED 与苹果的 20 年沉浮

According to reports, Apple is testing a new dark red color for the iPhone 18 Pro series. This marks the first time a red hue has appeared on an iPhone Pro model, and it's also the return of red after a four-year hiatus since the iPhone 14 in 2022. 据报道，苹果正为 iPhone 18 Pro 系列测试全新深红色配色。这是红色系首次登陆 iPhone Pro 机型，也是自 2022 年 iPhone 14 后，红色时隔四年的回归。

(In March 2017, the iPhone 7 and iPhone 7 Plus (PRODUCT)RED Special Edition were released, but Apple has not launched one since the iPhone 14.) （2017 年 3 月，iPhone 7 和 iPhone 7 Plus 红色特别版发布，而在 iPhone 14 之后苹果再无推出过）

The return of red is thanks to the unibody aluminum alloy manufacturing process adopted by the iPhone 17 Pro. This new process significantly enhances the color rendering and consistency of metal surfaces, giving the Pro series stronger feasibility in color expansion. 此次红色回归得益于 iPhone 17 Pro 启用的铝合金一体成型机身工艺。这种新工艺显著提升了金属表面的着色表现力与一致性，让 Pro 系列在色彩拓展方面具备更强可行性。

According to leaks, the iPhone 18 Pro may adopt a "dual flagship color" strategy: deep red as a new color, while retaining the previous generation's popular "Starry Orange." Previously rumored colors such as purple and brown are merely test variants of deep red under different process parameters. 据爆料，iPhone 18 Pro 可能采用「双旗舰配色」策略：深红色作为新配色，同时保留上一代大热的「星宇橙」。此前传闻的紫色、棕色等配色，则只是深红色在不同工艺参数下的测试变体。

It is worth noting that Apple has adopted a completely different color strategy for the foldable iPhone Fold: offering only two basic shades, dark gray/black and white/light silver, returning to the classic color logic of the original iPhone. 值得注意的是，苹果对折叠屏 iPhone Fold 采取了截然不同的配色策略：仅提供深灰/黑色和白色/浅银色两款基础色调，回归初代 iPhone 的经典配色逻辑。

Regarding sales information, blogger "Chanashuma" recently posted that the iPhone Fold foldable screen will begin formal mass production around July, similar to the iPhone 18 Pro, and will be released simultaneously. 销售信息方面，博主「刹那数码」近期发文表示，iPhone Fold 折叠屏会跟 iPhone 18 Pro 一样在 7 月左右开启正式的大规模量产，并同步发售。

This news is also consistent with analyst Ming-Chi Kuo's previous predictions. Kuo previously pointed out that these two products would be launched in the second half of 2026, while the standard iPhone 18 and iPhone 18e would be delayed until the first half of 2027. 而这一消息也与分析师郭明錤此前预测一致，郭明錤曾指出这两款产品会在 2026 年下半年推出，而标准版 iPhone 18 与 iPhone 18e 则推迟到 2027 年上半年。

Additionally, on New Year's Eve, iFanr received an invitation from Apple, officially announcing that its first press conference of 2026 will be held on March 4th at 10 PM. 另外，在除夕夜当晚，爱范儿收到了来自苹果的邀请函，官宣将于 3 月 4 日晚 10 点举办 2026 年的首场发布会。

According to previous predictions, this spring event will kick off Apple's "packed" product lineup for 2026, and we expect to see a host of new products unveiled, including but not limited to: 根据之前的预测，这次春季发布会将是苹果 2026 年「满满当当」的产品线的开头，我们预计会见到一大票新品的亮相，包括但不限于：

  • iPhone 17e: Equipped with the same A19 processor as the iPhone 17, completing MagSafe; the new device will also serve as a test platform for Apple's next-generation self-developed cellular modem and wireless chips (C1X and N1); and will likely switch to a Dynamic Island display. iPhone 17e：搭载 iPhone 17 同款 A19 处理器，补齐 MagSafe；新机还将作为苹果新一代自研蜂窝网络基带与无线芯片（C1X 和 N1）的测试平台；并且大概率会切换为灵动岛屏幕。
  • Unnamed MacBook with A18 processor: Expected to feature the A18 Pro processor; screen size estimated at 12.9 inches; the new device will offer multiple vibrant colors: including light yellow, light green, blue, pink, as well as classic silver and space gray. 使用 A18 处理器的无印 MacBook：预计将搭载 A18 Pro 处理器；屏幕尺寸预估为 12.9 寸；新机将提供多款活泼配色：包括浅黄、浅绿、蓝色、粉色，以及经典的银色和深空灰。
  • MacBook Pro with M5 Pro/Max M5 Pro/Max 款的 MacBook Pro
  • Next-generation iPad Air and unnamed iPad 新一代 iPad Air 和无印 iPad
  • New versions of Studio Display, Apple TV, and HomePod mini 新版 Studio Display、Apple TV 和 HomePod mini

Gurman also recently reported that Apple is accelerating the development of three new wearable devices: smart glasses, wearable pendants, and AirPods with cameras. Gurman 还在近期报道提到，苹果正在加速研发三款新型可穿戴设备：智能眼镜、可穿戴挂件以及带摄像头的 AirPods。

The smart glasses are positioned at the high end, benchmarked against Meta's AI glasses series, with an internal codename N50, making them the flagship product in Apple's AI hardware lineup; similar to Meta's Ray-Ban glasses, they do not have a display but interact via speakers, microphones, and cameras. 智能眼镜定位最高端，对标 Meta AI 眼镜系列，内部代号为 N50，是苹果 AI 硬件阵容中的旗舰产品；与 Meta 的 Ray-Ban 眼镜类似，它不具备显示屏，而是通过扬声器、麦克风和摄像头进行交互。

Apple will differentiate itself through high-end materials in manufacturing processes and camera technology, not relying on third-party frames but rather entirely self-developed designs. It is reported that Apple has already prototyped various colors and material styles internally. 苹果将在制造工艺和摄像头技术上通过高端材料做出差异化，并不依赖第三方镜框，而是完全自研设计。据悉，苹果内部已经打样了多种颜色、材质的款式。

Functionally, these glasses will be equipped with dual cameras: one for capturing high-resolution photos and videos, and the other focused on computer vision for understanding environmental context (similar to Vision Pro technology). 在功能层面，这款眼镜将配备双摄像头：一颗用于拍摄高分辨率照片和视频，另一颗专注于计算机视觉，用于理解环境背景（类似 Vision Pro 的技术）。

As for the new AI pendants and AirPods, they represent a lighter intervention method. This is a low-barrier solution Apple has prepared specifically for users who prefer not to wear glasses: 至于新的 AI 挂件与 AirPods，则是一种更轻量的介入方式。这是苹果专门针对不愿佩戴眼镜的用户准备的低门槛方案：

  • One is a pendant similar to the Humane AI Pin, which can be clipped to clothing or worn as a necklace, acting as an "external sense" for the phone. 一款是类似 Humane AI Pin 的挂件，可夹在衣服或作为项链佩戴，充当手机的「外置感官」。
  • There is also a version of AirPods with a camera, primarily relying on a low-resolution camera to assist AI operations, offering a discreet form factor and high popularity. 还有一款带摄像头的 AirPods，主要依靠低分辨率摄像头辅助 AI 运行，形态隐蔽且普及度高。

Currently, the development progress of these three products varies: AirPods with cameras are progressing the fastest, expected to be released as early as this year; the AI pendant device is currently in its early stages, and if not canceled, will be launched as early as next year; while the mass production plan for smart glasses is set to start in December, with an official release expected in 2027. 目前，这三款产品的研发进度不一：带摄像头的 AirPods 进展最快，最早有望于今年面世；AI 挂件设备目前处于早期阶段，若未被取消，最早将于明年推出；而智能眼镜的量产计划定于 12 月启动，预计 2027 年正式发布。

It is worth mentioning that the computing power of these three AI hardware products still relies on the iPhone, and they are not independent computing platforms. 值得一提的是，这三款 AI 硬件产品的算力仍需依赖 iPhone，并非独立的计算平台。

item.title: 春节 AI 大战落幕：新模型齐爆发，还有机器人春晚
item.guid: 春节-AI-大战落幕：新模型齐爆发，还有机器人春晚
item.description:
While everyone was celebrating the Spring Festival holiday, various AI manufacturers also put in great effort to present users with a series of new products and marketing activities. We have also compiled this super review of the "Spring Festival AI Battle": 在大家欢庆春节假期期间，各家 AI 厂商也拼足了劲为用户奉上了一系列新品以及营销活动，我们也为此制作了这次「春节 AI 大战」的超级盘点：

    Alibaba's Tongyi Qianwen

Qianwen officially announced yesterday: During the Spring Festival, Qianwen helped users "place an order with one sentence" nearly 200 million times. It launched the first wave of "Spring Festival 3 billion free orders" on February 6. 千问官方昨天宣布：春节期间，千问帮大家「一句话下单」近 2 亿次。其于 2 月 6 日开启了第一波「春节 30 亿大免单」。

On New Year's Eve, Alibaba also released and open-sourced the Qwen3.5 series models, and quickly completed their deployment on the chat.qwen.ai platform. 而在除夕当晚，阿里还发布并开源了 Qwen3.5 系列模型，并迅速在 chat.qwen.ai 平台完成部署。

Benchmark test results show that Qwen 3.5 leads comparable open-source models in several core capability dimensions, including multimodal understanding, complex reasoning, programming, and Agent intelligence, with multiple benchmarks rivaling top-tier closed-source models like Gemini-3-pro. 基准测试结果显示，Qwen 3.5 在多模态理解、复杂推理、编程、Agent 智能体等几大核心能力维度都是领先于同级开源模型，多项基准媲美 Gemini-3-pro 等闭源第一梯队。

🔗 Related reading: Alibaba serves up Spring Festival's "hard dish" Qianwen 3.5! I had it create a New Year's greeting webpage, and the results were unexpected 🔗 相关阅读： 阿里端出春节「硬菜」千问 3.5！我让它做了个拜年网页，结果出乎意料

    Doubao

Before the Spring Festival, the Doubao team successively released the video generation model Seedance 2.0, the image generation model Seedream 5.0, and the Doubao Large Model 2.0 version. 豆包团队在春节前接连发布了视频生成模型 Seedance 2.0、生图模型 Seedream 5.0 以及豆包大模型 2.0 版本。

Among them, Seedance 2.0 has garnered significant attention and praise both domestically and internationally due to its super strong visual consistency and unique multi-camera narrative function. Feng Ji, the producer of "Black Myth: Wukong" and founder of Game Science, even posted an evaluation calling it "currently the strongest video generation model on Earth". 其中 Seedance 2.0 因超强的画面一致性、独有的多镜头叙事功能，收获了国内外不少关注以及好评。其中《黑神话：悟空》制作人、游戏科学创始人冯骥还发文评价称其为「当前地表最强的视频生成模型」。

🔗 Related reading: Seedance 2.0 Complete Getting Started Guide: 4 Major Entry Points, Popular Gameplay, Detailed Prompts All Here 🔗 相关阅读： Seedance 2.0 最全上手指南：4 大入口、火爆玩法、详细提示词都在这

The subsequently released Doubao Large Model 2.0 series achieved the industry's highest scores on benchmarks suchs as VLMsAreBiased and OmniDocBench. 而随后发布的豆包大模型 2.0 系列在 VLMsAreBiased、OmniDocBench 等基准上均取得了业界最高分。

🔗 Related reading: I hand-coded macOS with Doubao Large Model 2.0, ByteDance delivers another Spring Festival AI gift after Seedance 2.0 🔗 相关阅读： 我用豆包大模型2.0手搓了macOS，Seedance 2.0后字节再送春节AI大礼

    Tencent Yuanbao

Before the Spring Festival, Yuanbao updated its "Yuanbao Pai" group chat AI gameplay and subsequently launched an activity to "distribute 1 billion yuan in cash red packets". 元宝在春节前更新了「元宝派」的群聊 AI 玩法，并在后续开启了「分 10 亿元现金红包」活动。

Tencent announced on February 18 that Yuanbao's daily active users (DAU) exceeded 50 million, and its monthly active users (MAU) reached 114 million. 腾讯 2 月 18 日宣布，元宝的日活跃用户（DAU）超 5000 万，月活跃用户（MAU）已达 1.14 亿。

The day before, Tencent's report on the Yuanbao 1 billion yuan cash red packet distribution activity showed that the Yuanbao Spring Festival main venue accumulated over 3.6 billion lottery draws, and users completed over 1 billion AI tasks through the "Creation" section. 而在此前一天，腾讯发布的元宝分 10 亿元现金红包活动报告显示，元宝春节主会场累计抽奖次数超 36 亿次，用户通过「创作」栏完成 AI 任务超 10 亿次。

    Robot Spring Festival Gala

The 2026 Spring Festival Gala witnessed the "highest mechanical intelligence" ever: Songyan Power robots, Cai Ming, and Doubao AI co-starred in a sketch comedy; Unitree led the martial arts program "Wu BOT," cosplaying as the Monkey King; and Magic Atom's quadruped robot dogs, wheeled robot dogs, and robot pandas appeared on stage. 2026 年春晚见证了有史以来「机械智能最高」的一届：松延动力机器人、蔡明、豆包 AI 共同出演小品节目；宇树领演的武术类节目《武 BOT》、cosplay 美猴王；魔法原子的四足机器狗、轮式机器狗和机器熊猫亮相舞台。

At the same time, Seedance 2.0 was applied in the visual production of multiple programs, including the opening dance "Miracle on the Horse," the dance "Ancient Rhyme of the Silk Road," the song "Galloping Sea Horse," and so on. 同时 Seedance 2.0 被应用在了多个节目的视觉制作环节，包含开场舞《马上有奇迹》、舞蹈《丝路古韵》、歌曲《奔腾的海骝马》等等。

🔗 Related reading: Unexpectedly, the first field robots "replaced" was the Spring Festival Gala 🔗 相关阅读： 没想到，机器人第一个「取代」的领域是春晚

    OpenClaw's father announces joining OpenAI

On New Year's Eve (February 16), Peter Steinberger, the developer of OpenClaw, a globally popular AI agent building platform, officially announced joining OpenAI. 除夕当天（2 月 16 日），火爆全球的 AI 智能体搭建平台 OpenClaw 开发者 Peter Steinberger 官宣加入 OpenAI。

It is reported that the negotiation terms offered by OpenAI are quite attractive—allowing them to be responsible for personal AI agent-related work at OpenAI, participate in other product development, and even discuss establishing a foundation specifically to operate the OpenClaw open-source project. 据悉，OpenAI 方面给出的谈判条件相当诱人——让他们在 OpenAI 负责个人智能体相关工作，顺便参与其他产品开发，甚至还在讨论成立一个基金会专门运营 OpenClaw 开源项目。

🔗 Related reading: OpenClaw's father announces joining OpenAI, Zuckerberg fails to poach talent 🔗 相关阅读： OpenClaw之父宣布加入OpenAI，小扎抢人失败

    Gemini 3.1 Pro Released

On February 20, Google officially announced the preview version of Gemini 3.1 Pro. 2 月 20 日，Google 正式公布了 Gemini 3.1 Pro 预览版。

In terms of performance, Gemini 3.1 Pro scored 77.1% in the ARC-AGI-2 benchmark, which tests the model's ability to solve new logical patterns, more than double its predecessor 3 Pro (31.1%), and also surpassed Anthropic's Opus 4.6 (68.8%) and OpenAI's GPT-5.2 (52.9%). 性能表现上，在测试模型解决全新逻辑模式能力的 ARC-AGI-2 基准中，Gemini 3.1 Pro 拿下 77.1%，是上代 3 Pro（31.1%）的两倍多，同时压过了 Anthropic 的 Opus 4.6（68.8%）和 OpenAI 的 GPT-5.2（52.9%）。

In terms of programming capabilities, the Elo rating for the competitive programming benchmark LiveCodeBench Pro reached 2887, surpassing 3 Pro's 2439 and GPT-5.2's 2393. On SWE-Bench Verified, 3.1 Pro scored 80.6%, essentially tying with Opus 4.6's 80.8%. 编程能力方面，竞争性编程基准 LiveCodeBench Pro 的 Elo 评分达到 2887，超过 3 Pro 的 2439 和 GPT-5.2 的 2393。SWE-Bench Verified 上，3.1 Pro 拿了 80.6%，和 Opus 4.6 的 80.8% 基本打平。

🔗 Related reading: Gemini 3.1 Pro Released! Tsinghua's Yao Shunyu promotes it, Karpathy: The era of app stores is over 🔗 相关阅读： Gemini 3.1 Pro 发布！清华姚顺宇站台宣传，Karpathy：应用商店的时代结束了

    Moonshot AI becomes the fastest company in China to reach decacorn status

According to The Paper, after continuous financing of over $1.2 billion, large model unicorn Moonshot AI (Kimi) received the highest financing amount in the large model industry in the past year, also setting a record for the fastest speed for a domestic company to advance from establishment to decacorn enterprise (valued over $10 billion). 据澎湃新闻报道，在连续融资超 12 亿美元后，大模型独角兽月之暗面（Kimi）获得近一年大模型行业的最高融资金额，也创下国内公司从成立到晋级十角兽企业（估值超 100 亿美元）的最快晋级速度。

Public data shows that ByteDance previously took over 4 years to break the $10 billion valuation mark, Pinduoduo took over 3 years, while Kimi, from its $300 million angel round to a valuation exceeding $10 billion, took just over two years, with its value increasing more than 30 times. 公开资料显示，此前字节估值突破百亿美元大关用时超 4 年，拼多多用时超 3 年，而 Kimi 从天使轮的 3 亿美元到估值过百，仅用两年多的时间，身价已翻了 30 多倍。

The report states that less than a month after the release of Kimi's K2.5 large model, Kimi's cumulative revenue in the past 20 days has already exceeded its total revenue for the entire year of 2025. This growth is primarily driven by a surge in global paying users and API call volume, with overseas paying users maintaining particularly high growth, and Kimi's overseas revenue now surpassing its domestic revenue. 报道称，Kimi 旗下 K2.5 大模型发布不到一个月，Kimi 近 20 天累计收入已超过 2025 年全年总收入，增长主要受全球付费用户及 API 调用量大涨共同驱动，特别是海外付费用户保持高速增长，Kimi 海外收入已超国内。

    OpenAI to launch ChatGPT Pro Lite version

According to blogger "Tibor Blaho" on February 21, OpenAI will introduce a Pro Lite subscription plan in ChatGPT, priced at $100/month (approximately RMB 690). 据博主「Tibor Blaho」2 月 21 日消息，OpenAI 将会在 ChatGPT 中加推一个 Pro Lite 的订阅套餐，价格为 100 美元/月（约合人民币 690 元）。

Based on the leaked information, Pro Lite may offer 3 to 5 times the deep thinking model usage quota compared to the Plus version, but it is not expected to include the professional mode exclusive to the Pro version. 从曝光的信息来看，Pro Lite 可能提供相当于 Plus 版本 3~5 倍的深度思考模型使用配额，但预计不会包含 Pro 版本专属的专业模式。

    Nvidia to complete $30 billion investment in OpenAI

According to the Financial Times, Nvidia is in the final stages of negotiations with OpenAI for an investment of $30 billion (approximately RMB 207.2 billion). 据《金融时报》消息，英伟达正在与 OpenAI 进行最后阶段的谈判，投资金额达 300 亿美元（约合人民币 2072 亿元）。

Sources familiar with the matter stated that this $30 billion equity investment is part of a larger financing round, which is expected to raise over $100 billion and increase OpenAI's valuation to $730 billion, excluding new funds. 知情人士介绍，这笔 300 亿美元的股权投资是更大规模融资的一部分，该融资有望筹集超过 1000 亿美元，并将 OpenAI 估值提高到 7300 亿美元，不包括新资金。

It is worth mentioning that relevant sources also added that OpenAI will reinvest most of its new capital into Nvidia hardware, but the two companies will not proceed with their $100 billion multi-year investment cooperation plan announced in September. 值得一提的是，相关人士还补充表示，OpenAI 将将其大部分新资本重新投资于英伟达硬件，但两家公司不会推进他们于 9 月宣布的 1000 亿美元多年期投资合作计划。

According to the terms of the previous $100 billion agreement, as OpenAI's demand for computing power grows, Nvidia will invest $10 billion ten times over ten years in exchange for a significant stake in the AI startup. 根据此前的 1000 亿美元协议条款显示，随着 OpenAI 对计算能力需求的增长，英伟达将分十年投入十次 100 亿美元，以换取该人工智能初创公司的重要股份。

item.title: 宇树《武 BOT》续集上线
item.description:
Yesterday, Unitree Robotics released the "Unitree Wu BOT Temple of Heaven Blessing" video, showcasing its G1 robot cluster demonstration. 昨日，宇树科技发布「宇树武 BOT 天坛祈福」视频，并展示了旗下 G1 机器人集群演示。

It is worth mentioning that during this year's Year of the Horse Spring Festival Gala, Unitree used dozens of G1 robots to achieve the world's first fully autonomous uniform performance by a humanoid robot cluster, setting multiple world records. 值得一提的是，今年马年春晚上，宇树则采用数十台 G1 机器人实现了全球首个人形机器人集群全自助工服表演，并创下多项世界第一。

🔗 Related reading: Spring Festival Gala robots blew up the internet! Foreigners studied frame by frame to verify authenticity: calling it amazing 🔗 相关阅读： 春晚机器人炸翻外网！老外逐帧研究真假：直呼 amazing

During an interview with CCTV Spring Festival Gala, Wang Xingxing also exclusively revealed the "training secrets" of "Wu BOT". The report stated that for these two items, the Spring Festival Gala program team and Unitree Robotics team jointly polished multiple "globally pioneering" robot movements, such as "continuous fancy table-flipping parkour" and "Airflare seven-and-a-half spins". 在接受央视春晚的采访时，王兴兴还独家揭秘了《武 BOT》的「练功秘籍」。报道称，为了这的两项，春晚节目组和宇树科技的团队一同打磨了多个机器人「全球首创」动作，如「连续花式翻桌跑酷」「Airflare 大回旋七周半」等。

Wang Xingxing also explained that the breathtaking catapult takeoff actually involves the humanoid robot jumping onto a customized catapult, then "jumping" 2 to 3 meters high, and landing steadily after completing front and side flips in the air. 王兴兴还介绍称，那个让人捏把汗的弹射起飞，其实是让人形机器人跳上定制的弹射器，然后就可以「跳」到 2 至 3 米高，并在空中完成正空翻及侧空翻动作后平稳落地。

item.title: 蚂蚁阿福 APP、支付宝「AI 付」用户数双破亿
item.guid: 蚂蚁阿福-APP、支付宝「AI-付」用户数双破亿
item.description:
On the seventh day of the Lunar New Year of the Horse, Ant Group disclosed its Spring Festival holiday operational data, revealing a comprehensive boom in its core AI businesses: 马年大年初七，蚂蚁集团披露春节假期实战数据，核心 AI 业务实现全面爆发：

Alipay's "AI Pay" user count exceeded 100 million, and the total user count of Ant Afu APP also surpassed the 100 million mark.

In the first Spring Festival where AI technology entered large-scale application, Ant Group achieved differentiated breakthroughs in the Spring Festival AI battle, thanks to its performance in the payment and health sectors. 在 AI 技术进入大规模应用的第一个春节，蚂蚁凭借在支付与健康领域的表现，在春节 AI 大战中实现了差异化突围。

In AI-native payments, as AI technology deeply integrates into daily consumption scenarios, Alipay's "AI Pay" experienced a surge during the Spring Festival. 在 AI 原生支付上，随着 AI 技术深入日常消费场景，支付宝「AI 付」在春节期间迎来爆发。

Data shows that after payment transactions exceeded 120 million on February 12, the number of users officially surpassed 100 million. Thus, Alipay's "AI Pay" has become the world's first AI-native payment product with both payment transactions and user numbers exceeding 100 million, marking its official entry into the large-scale commercialization stage. 数据显示，继 2 月 12 日支付笔数突破 1.2 亿笔后，用户数也正式超过 1 亿。至此，支付宝「AI 付」成为全球首个支付笔数与用户人数双双破亿的 AI 原生支付产品，标志着该产品正式进入大规模商用阶段。

In independent AI health applications, "Ant Afu" quickly entered the national spotlight and garnered widespread attention through its "Health Fu" activity and appearance at the CCTV Year of the Horse Spring Festival Gala. 在独立 AI 健康应用上，「蚂蚁阿福」通过「健康福」活动及亮相央视马年春晚，迅速进入国民视野并引发广泛关注。

Latest data shows that the total user count of the independent Ant Afu APP has rapidly exceeded 100 million, making it the world's largest health AI App. During the Spring Festival holiday, the trend of young people returning home teaching their families to use Afu drove a continuous surge in Afu App downloads, topping Apple's App Store overall download chart for multiple consecutive days. 最新数据显示，蚂蚁阿福独立 APP 的总用户数已迅速超过 1 亿，成为全球第一大健康 AI App。春节假期，返乡青年教家人用阿福的热潮，推动阿福 App 下载量持续飙升，连续多天登顶苹果 App Store 应用下载总榜第一。

It is worth noting that among the new users of Ant Afu App during the Spring Festival, 52% came from third-tier cities and below. 值得一提的是，蚂蚁阿福 App 的春节新增用户中，52% 来自三线及以下城市。

item.title: 荣耀将推出首款人形机器人
item.guid: 荣耀将推出首款人形机器人
item.description:
According to information obtained by "Sci-Tech Innovation Board Daily", Honor will launch its first humanoid robot during the 2026 Mobile World Congress (2026 MWC) in Barcelona, focusing on the consumer market and becoming the world's first mobile phone company to enter the humanoid robot field. 据《科创板日报》获悉，荣耀将在 2026 年巴塞罗那移动通信展（2026 MWC）期间推出其首款人形机器人，聚焦消费市场，成为全球第一家入局人形机器人的手机公司。

According to previous news from Xinhua Net, at the Honor 400 series launch event last May, Honor CEO Li Jian announced the company's entry into the robotics industry, shared behind-the-scenes stories of employees and robot R&D, and revealed that their developed robot's running speed has reached 4m/s, breaking previous industry records. 据新华网此前消息，去年 5 月的荣耀 400 系列发布会上，荣耀 CEO 李健宣布进军机器人产业，讲述了员工与机器人研发的幕后故事，并透露其研发的机器人跑步速度已达 4m/s，并打破之前行业纪录。

It is worth mentioning that Honor also unveiled a demonstration of its ROBOT Phone project last year. The product is touted as having "AI brain + robot mobility + ultimate imaging," featuring a foldable and multi-angle rotating gimbal camera. 值得一提的是，荣耀还在去年公布了其 ROBOT Phone 项目的展示。该产品号称「AI 大脑+机器人行动力+极致影像」，拥有一枚可翻折以及多角度旋转的云台相机。

item.title: 特斯拉无线充电技术获批
item.guid: 特斯拉无线充电技术获批
item.description:
The U.S. Federal Communications Commission (FCC) has officially approved Tesla's deployment of Ultra-Wideband (UWB) technology in its CyberCab models for high-precision positioning in wireless charging systems. 美国联邦通信委员会（FCC）正式批准了特斯拉在其 CyberCab 车型上部署超宽带（UWB）技术，用于无线充电系统的高精度定位。

According to documents disclosed by the FCC, this system is defined as a pulsed UWB radio device that establishes a point-to-point communication link through UWB transceivers mounted on both the vehicle and the ground charging pad. 根据 FCC 披露的文件，这套系统被定义为一种脉冲式 UWB 无线电装置，通过车载与地面充电板各自搭载的 UWB 收发器建立点对点通信链路。

When the vehicle approaches the charging area, the system can track its spatial position in real-time, guiding the CyberCab to precisely park at the alignment point with the highest charging efficiency. 当车辆驶近充电区域时，系统可实时追踪其空间位置，引导 CyberCab 精准停靠至充电效率最高的对准点。

It is worth noting that the UWB signal designed by Tesla is only briefly activated the moment the vehicle approaches the charging pad, and primarily propagates within the near-field space between the vehicle body and the ground. 值得注意的是，特斯拉设计的 UWB 信号仅在车辆靠近充电板的瞬间短暂激活，且主要在车身与地面之间的近场空间内传播。

This low-power, short-duration, directional communication strategy not only ensures positioning accuracy but also effectively avoids potential interference with surrounding electronic devices. 这种低功耗、短时、定向的通信策略，既保障了定位精度，又有效规避了对周边电子设备的潜在干扰。

Tesla specifically emphasized that the signal is completely turned off when not in operation, and the vehicle body structure itself also acts as a shield, further reducing the risk of electromagnetic leakage. 特斯拉特别强调，信号在非工作状态下完全关闭，且车身结构本身也起到屏蔽作用，进一步降低电磁泄露风险。

Although wireless charging technology has received regulatory approval, the currently revealed CyberCab prototype is still connected to a traditional Tesla Supercharger. 尽管无线充电技术已获监管许可，目前曝光的 CyberCab 原型车仍连接着传统的特斯拉超级充电桩。

It is speculated that early production models are likely to be compatible with both wireless charging and the existing Supercharger network—the former representing a future experience, the latter ensuring current practicality. 推测量产初期的车型很可能同时兼容无线充电与现有超充网络——前者代表未来体验，后者确保当下实用性。

item.title: 亚马逊否认「AI 导致 AWS 停机 13 小时」
item.guid: 亚马逊否认「AI-导致-AWS-停机-13-小时」
item.description:
Recently, the Financial Times, citing sources, reported that in mid-December last year, Amazon's AI programming assistant "Kiro," when allowed to make modifications, determined the best course of action was to "delete and rebuild the environment," leading to a 13-hour outage of the AWS system. 近期，《金融时报》援引知情人士消息称，在去年 12 月中旬，亚马逊的 AI 编程助手「Kiro」在被允许进行修改时，判断最佳的操作方案是「删除并重建环境」，从而导致了 AWS 系统长达 13 小时的中断。

Several Amazon employees also told the media that this was the second time in recent months that an AI tool was involved in a service disruption, with senior staff calling these outages "small but entirely foreseeable." 其中多名亚马逊员工还向该媒体透露，这是近几个月来 AI 工具第二次卷入服务中断事件，并有高级员工称这些宕机「虽小但完全是可以预见的」。

In response, Amazon strongly denied these claims in an official blog post titled "Correcting the Financial Times' Reporting on AWS, Kiro, and AI." 对此，亚马逊在一篇题为《纠正金融时报关于 AWS、Kiro 和 AI 的报道》的官方博客文章中予以了强烈否认。

Amazon admitted that a single service in a specific region did experience an outage last December. However, this was entirely due to "user error (incorrect role configuration)" when configuring access controls, not a flaw in the AI tool itself. 其中亚马逊承认去年 12 月在一个特定区域的一项单一服务确实出现了中断。但这完全是由于配置访问控制时的「用户失误（角色配置错误）」造成的，并非 AI 工具本身的缺陷。

Amazon emphasized that such issues can occur with any developer tool (whether AI-based or not) or manual operation. 亚马逊强调，这类问题在任何开发者工具（无论是否基于 AI）或手动操作中都可能发生。

Amazon stated directly in its blog that the Financial Times' claim about a second AWS outage was "completely false." 亚马逊在博客中直言，《金融时报》关于发生第二次 AWS 宕机事件的说法「完全错误」。

An AWS spokesperson later clarified to GeekWire that the second incident mentioned in the report did not occur within AWS operations but in other Amazon departments, thus the media's reporting on this point was incorrect. AWS 发言人随后还向 GeekWire 澄清称，报道中提到的第二次事件并未发生在 AWS 业务内部，而是亚马逊的其他部门，因此媒体的报道在此点上是错误的。

Amazon stated that after the incident, several new protective measures have been implemented, including mandatory human peer review for access to production environments. 亚马逊表示，事件发生后已实施了多项新的保护措施，包括强制要求对生产环境的访问进行人工同行评审。

item.title: 💡 奥特曼：人类吃 20 年饭不如训练 AI
item.guid: 💡-奥特曼：人类吃-20-年饭不如训练-AI
item.description:
Recently, at the Express Adda forum in India, Sam Altman discussed many AI topics, from AGI to US-China AI competition, and even water consumption issues in data centers. 近期，在印度 Express Adda 的论坛上，Sam Altman 聊了很多 AI 话题，从 AGI 到中美 AI 竞争，再到数据中心用水问题。

🔗 Related reading: Altman: Humans eating for 20 years is not as good as training AI, the whole internet exploded, netizens: say that again? 🔗 相关阅读： 奥特曼：人类吃 20 年饭不如训练 AI，全网炸了，网友：你再说一遍？

During this event, Altman interacted with the audience with light humor, discussing various aspects of AI development. He stated: "AI has evolved from being able to do high school math to pushing the boundaries of human knowledge." 在这次活动中，Altman 以轻松的幽默与观众互动，讨论了 AI 发展的各个方面。他表示：「AI 已经从能够做高中数学发展到推动人类知识的边界。」

Altman believes that the impact of AI on jobs is difficult to predict. "I like to read the history of technology. During the Industrial Revolution, people panicked about jobs, and they were astonishingly wrong. Change will not be as fast as some in society predict. But eventually, people will find new jobs," he said. Altman 认为，人工智能对工作的影响很难预测。「我喜欢读科技史。在工业革命时期，人们曾对工作感到恐慌，而他们惊人地错了。变革不会像社会上某些人预测的那样快。但最终人们会找到新的工作，」他说。

The most popular part of the entire discussion was Altman's response to criticism about AI's energy consumption: "People always talk about how much energy it takes to train AI models... but training humans also takes a lot of energy, it takes 20 years, consumes so much food, to become smart." 而整个讨论中，最火的那段是 Altman 回应 AI 能耗批评时说的：「人们总谈训练 AI 模型需要多少能源……但训练人类也需要大量能源，得花 20 年时间，消耗那么多食物，才能变聪明。」

But simply put, Altman feels it's unfair when people criticize AI by comparing the total energy consumption of 'training a model' with the instantaneous energy consumption of humans 'answering a question'. In his view, AI is not an energy killer, but a necessity for future civilization, just as some worried about job losses in the candle industry when electric lights were invented. 但简单来说，Altman 觉得大家批评 AI 时，总拿「训练模型」的总能耗和人类「回答一个问题」的瞬间能耗比，这不公平。在他看来，AI 不是能源杀手，而是未来文明的必需品，就像电灯发明时也有人担心蜡烛业失业一样。

item.title: 微信上线面对面传照片/收红包
item.guid: 微信上线面对面传照片/收红包
item.description:
According to our observations, WeChat recently launched a 'My QR Code' section in the scan interface. Upon entering, it can be seen that in addition to adding friends, WeChat now also supports receiving photos, files, and red packets face-to-face. 据我们观察发现，微信近期在扫一扫界面上线了一个「我的二维码」专区，进入后可以看到，除添加好友外， 微信现还支持面对面收照片、文件以及红包。

WeChat's face-to-face file transfer this time uses a 'WiFi + nearby devices' method, similar to transferring chat history. 微信本次面对面文件传输采用「WiFi+附近设备」的方式进行，与传输聊天记录类似。

Our tests show that this feature allows photo/file transfer without needing to add friends. 我们实测发现，该功能无需添加好友，即可完成照片/文件的传输。

This also means that another method for cross-device transfer has been added for the future. Currently, 'face-to-face photo and file transfer' only supports iOS and Android, but HarmonyOS has also launched a related 'scan entry'. 而这也意味着，未来跨设备之间传输又增加了一种方式。目前「面对面传照片、文件」仅支持 iOS、Android，但鸿蒙也已上线相关「扫一扫入口」。

item.title: Nothing Phone(4a) 外观公布
item.description:
Yesterday, Nothing officially unveiled the appearance information of its new phone, Phone(4a). 昨日，Nothing 官方正式公布了新机 Phone(4a) 的外观信息。

The new phone still retains Nothing's transparent back cover design. Compared to the 3a's design, the 4a's battery and small board areas are more organized and simple, while the camera module uses a metallic color process and a triple-camera setup. 新机依然保持了 Nothing 的透明背盖设计。相较于 3a 的设计，4a 电池及小板区域更加规整简单，同时镜头模组采用金属配色工艺，采用三摄方案。

It is worth noting that the Phone(4a) features a new Glyph Bar light, displayed through 9 independently controlled mini-LED light beads, with a 40% increase in brightness compared to the previous Phone(a) series; the rear red recording light is also retained. 值得注意的是，本次 Phone(4a) 采用了全新的 Glyph Bar 灯，通过 9 枚独立控制的 mini-LED 灯珠进行显示，亮度相较此前的 Phone(a) 系列提升 40%；同时后置红色录制灯得以保留。

The new phone will be released on March 5th. 新机将于 3 月 5 日发布。

item.title: 三星 S26 Ultra 宣传物料曝光
item.description:
Recently, promotional materials for the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra have been exposed. 日前，三星 Galaxy S26 Ultra 的宣传物料遭到曝光。

In terms of appearance, the new phone's overall design tends towards the standard version/+ version, featuring a double-stepped runway-shaped camera module, with two additional independently placed lens groups. The front uses a flat screen design and offers privacy display technology. 外观方面，新机整体设计趋于标准版/+版，采用双层台阶的跑道型镜头模组，另有两个独立摆放的镜组，正面采用直屏设计，提供隐私显示技术。

Regarding the S26 Ultra's imaging capabilities, it features a 200-megapixel main camera (supporting 2x optical quality cropping), a 50MP ultra-wide-angle lens, a 5x 50MP super telephoto lens, and a 10MP 3x mid-telephoto lens; the front camera is 12MP (supporting AF autofocus). S26 Ultra 的影像能力方面，采用了一枚 2 亿像素主摄（支持 2 倍光学品质裁切）、一枚 50MP 的超广角、一枚 5 倍 50MP 的超长焦以及一枚 10MP 的 3 倍中焦镜头；前置 12MP（支持 AF 自动对焦）。

The battery has a 5000mAh capacity, supporting a 75% charge in 30 minutes; from the exposed information, the European version of the new phone is expected to use the Exynos 2600 processor, claiming a 39% increase in NPU performance, a 24% increase in GPU performance, and a 19% increase in CPU performance (compared to S23 Ultra). 电池采用 5000mAh 容量，支持 30 分钟充至 75%；从曝光的信息来看，新机欧版预计采用 Exynos 2600 处理器，号称 NPU 性能提升 39%、GPU 性能提升 24%、CPU 性能提升 19%（对比 S23 Ultra）。

According to blogger 'Cenat Digital', the Galaxy Buds 4 Pro, released alongside, will see a certain price reduction compared to the Buds 3 Pro. 另据博主「刹那数码」消息，一同发布的 Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 售价相较于 Buds 3 Pro，将会有一定的下降。

The new phone is expected to be officially released at 2 AM on February 26th. 新机预计 2 月 26 日凌晨 2 点正式发布。

item.title: Xbox 新任 CEO 陷入公关危机
item.description:
Image courtesy of blogger 'Perma Banned'

Recently, Asha Sharma, former president of Microsoft CoreAI, crossed over to become Xbox CEO. To dispel external doubts about her 'lack of experience in the gaming industry,' she proactively disclosed her Xbox personal account (Gamertag: AMRAHSAHSA) the day after taking office and frequently responded to player questions on X. 近日，前微软 CoreAI 总裁 Asha Sharma 跨界接任 Xbox CEO。而为了打消外界对其「缺乏游戏行业经验」的质疑，她于上任次日主动公开了自己的 Xbox 个人账号（Gamertag: AMRAHSAHSA），并在 X 上高频回复玩家提问。

However, this PR move, intended to bridge the gap with players, unexpectedly 'backfired' and is now facing comprehensive data scrutiny and a community trust crisis. 然而，这一试图拉近玩家距离的公关举措却意外「翻车」，目前正面临全面的数据质疑与社区信任危机。

According to overseas media outlets like Insider Gaming and Windows Central, as well as data miners, Sharma's Xbox account, which she attempted to use to 'prove her gamer identity,' shows serious signs of unreasonable score boosting. 据 Insider Gaming、Windows Central 等海外媒体及数据挖掘者指出，Sharma 试图用来「证明玩家身份」的 Xbox 账号存在严重的不合理刷分迹象。

Public archives show that the account was created in mid-January 2026, making it only 1 month old. However, in just 4 weeks, the account played nearly 29 games and earned tens of thousands of achievement points. 公开档案显示，该账号创建于 2026 年 1 月中旬，距今仅有 1 个月历史。但在短短 4 周内，该账号游玩了近 29 款游戏并斩获上万成就分。

Not only did the unnatural phenomenon of "densely unlocking achievements across multiple unrelated games on the same day" occur, but records also showed that while she played "BALL x PIT" for 43 hours intensely within a week, she also rapidly achieved 100% completion for all achievements in several walking simulator games like "Firewatch." 其中不仅出现了「同一天跨多款毫无关联的游戏密集解锁成就」的非自然现象，记录还显示她在一周内高强度游玩 43 小时《球比伦战记》（BALL x PIT）的同时，光速实现了《看火人》（Firewatch）等多款步行模拟游戏的 100% 全成就通关。

In addition to abnormal game account data, Sharma's high-frequency interactions on social media also sparked significant controversy. 除了游戏账号数据异常，Sharma 在社交媒体上的高频互动也引发了巨大争议。

Several tech media outlets and industry insiders, including Tech4Gamers, pointed out that her replies exhibited highly structured, brief, and patterned use of emojis, leading to widespread suspicion that they were "PR rhetoric" assisted or even fully automatically generated by AI tools like Copilot. Tech4Gamers 等多家科技媒体与业内人士指出，其回复呈现出高度结构化、简短且模式化使用 Emoji 的特征，被广泛质疑是由 Copilot 等 AI 工具辅助甚至全自动生成的「公关话术」。

Dramatically, when faced with the direct question from netizens, "Are you an AI robot?", the former AI business executive only replied with the system prompt sound effect: "Beep Boop Beep Boop." 极具戏剧性的是，面对网友直接抛出的「你是否是 AI 机器人」的质问，这位前 AI 业务高管仅回复了系统提示音拟声词：「Beep Boop Beep Boop」。

Ironically, in her all-staff email on the day she took office, Sharma had explicitly pledged to "resist soulless AI junk content." 颇为讽刺的是，在她就职当天的全员信中，Sharma 曾明确承诺将「抵制缺乏灵魂的 AI 垃圾内容」。

Microsoft officials and Asha Sharma herself have yet to provide any substantive response to the accusations of "account data manipulation" and "AI-managed social media." 微软官方及 Asha Sharma 本人尚未对「账号数据刷分」与「AI 代管社交媒体」的指控作出任何实质性回应。

item.title: 原神将上线「语音功能」
item.description:
Yesterday, Genshin Impact announced that "Thousand Star Realm" will soon welcome "voice chat functionality," supporting free microphone use. 昨日，原神发布公告宣布，「千星奇域」即将迎来「语音功能」，支持自由开麦。

According to the introduction, the voice chat feature will be launched in the upcoming "Moon V" update. The official hope is that "voice chat functionality" will make gatherings in the lobby more lively, collaboration in levels more seamless, and bring players a more intimate and vivid adventure experience in the realm. 据介绍，语音功能将在即将到来的「月之五」更新中上线。官方希望，「语音功能」可以让大厅内的集结更加轻快，让关卡中的协作更加默契，为玩家带来更加紧密、生动的奇域冒险体验。

item.title: 广铁：多座高铁大站将全天营业
item.guid: 广铁：多座高铁大站将全天营业
item.description:
According to "China Railway" news, to cope with the continuously rising return passenger flow, China Railway Guangzhou Group Co., Ltd. has taken multiple measures to increase transport capacity: 据「中国铁路」消息，为应对持续攀升的返程客流，中国铁路广州局集团有限公司多措并举，提升运能：

From February 21st to 28th, and March 5th to 6th, additional night high-speed trains will be operated, covering popular high-speed rail lines such as Beijing-Guangzhou, Guangzhou-Shenzhen-Hong Kong, Hangzhou-Shenzhen, Guiyang-Guangzhou, and Nanning-Guangzhou high-speed railways, to fully meet passenger travel demands.

Specifically, during the period of additional night high-speed trains, stations like Guangzhou South, Shenzhen North, and Changsha South will operate 24 hours a day, providing round-the-clock manual ticketing, refunds, changes, and services for key passengers. 具体来看，加开夜间高铁期间，广州南、深圳北、长沙南站等车站实行 24 小时作业模式，全天候为旅客提供人工售票、退票、改签及重点旅客服务。

It is reported that Guangzhou South Station alone is expected to handle 21.35 million passenger arrivals and departures during this year's Spring Festival travel rush, earning it the title of "the busiest high-speed rail station in the country." 据悉，其中广州南站今年春运预计到发旅客 2135 万人次，堪称「全国最忙高铁站」。

Officials also stated that a "non-disturbance" service mode is implemented on trains: crew members walk lightly, speak softly, and move gently in the carriages to create a comfortable "light sleep" environment for passengers, and provide "point-to-point" reminders and wake-up services 15 minutes before arrival to ensure passengers alight on time. 官方还表示，列车上实施「不打扰」服务模式：乘务人员在车厢内做到走路轻、说话轻、动作轻，尽量为旅客创造舒适的「轻睡」环境，并在到站前 15 分钟对旅客进行「点对点」提醒与叫醒服务，确保旅客及时下车。

item.title: 2026 年中国电影票房突破 80 亿元
item.description:
According to CCTV.com, as of February 23rd, China's film box office (including pre-sales) for 2026 has exceeded 8 billion RMB, with the Spring Festival holiday box office surpassing 5.6 billion RMB. Currently, China's film box office leads the global film market with an achievement of nearly 1 billion RMB more than the North American market. 据央视网消息，截至 2 月 23 日，2026 年中国电影票房（含预售）已突破 80 亿元人民币，其中，春节档票房超 56 亿元。目前，中国电影票房以超北美市场近 10 亿元人民币的成绩领跑全球电影市场。

The report states that this year's Spring Festival film releases cover a full range of genres, including comedy, action, animation, and sci-fi, offering audiences a rich and diverse selection of viewing choices. 报道称，今年春节档上映影片类型全，涵盖喜剧、动作、动画、科幻等多元题材，为观众呈现丰富多彩的观影选择。

Among them, "Pegasus 3" broke 2.8 billion RMB in box office within 7 days of its release, becoming the box office champion. Closely following were "Sting of the Silent" and "Blade of the Stranger: Wind Rises in the Desert," both achieving impressive box office results. 其中，《飞驰人生 3》上映 7 天，票房已突破 28 亿元，成为票房冠军。紧随其后的分别是《惊蛰无声》《镖人：风起大漠》，均取得不俗票房成绩。

🔗 Related Reading: The narrative logic is still cliché, but "Pegasus 3" remains the best Chinese racing film 🔗 相关阅读： 叙事逻辑依旧俗套，但《飞驰人生 3》仍是最好的华语赛车片

The report points out that driven by the "2026 Film Economy Promotion Year," various regions have also launched unique film economy promotion activities, such as distributing public welfare movie vouchers, to stimulate audience enthusiasm for watching films. 报道指出，在「2026 电影经济促进年」带动下，各地还开展各具特色的电影经济促进活动，通过发放惠民观影消费券等，激发观众观影热情。

At the same time, "Film+" has undergone a comprehensive iteration and upgrade, with activities such as "traveling with movies, visiting markets, tasting delicacies, and appreciating intangible cultural heritage," promoting the further deep integration and development of "film IP + cultural tourism resources," transforming film "traffic" into consumption "growth." 与此同时，「电影+」全面迭代升级，「跟着电影去旅游、逛集市、品美食、赏非遗」等活动，推动「电影 IP+文旅资源」进一步深度融合发展，让电影「流量」转化为消费「增量」。

item.title: 《虹猫蓝兔七侠传》4K 修复版定档今晚
item.guid: 《虹猫蓝兔七侠传》4K-修复版定档今晚
item.description:
On February 22nd, "Hongmao & Lantu Official Weibo" posted an announcement: 2 月 22 日，「虹猫蓝兔官方微博」发文宣布：

The 4K restored version of "Hongmao Blue Rabbit Seven Heroes" is officially scheduled to air from February 24 (the eighth day of the Lunar New Year), every evening at 18:00 on the "Revisit Classics" channel, guided by the National Radio and Television Administration and hosted by China Broadcasting Network, with two episodes broadcast daily.

It is reported that the original "Hongmao Blue Rabbit Seven Heroes" is a wuxia animated TV series produced by Hunan Hongmeng Cartoon Communication Co., Ltd., with He Mengfan as the chief screenwriter, Wang Hong as the chief director, and Fu Yilin, Yan Ting, Liu Rong, Liu Juan, and others as the main voice actors. 据悉，原版《虹猫蓝兔七侠传》是湖南宏梦卡通传播有限公司制作、贺梦凡总编剧，王宏总执导，付以琳、晏婷、刘蓉、刘娟等主要配音的武侠动画电视剧。

It mainly tells the story of young hero Hongmao, who, following his father's dying wish, takes on the important task of saving the forest environment, descends the mountain in anger to find the other six sword heirs, and eventually gathers the seven swords to defeat Black Heart Tiger. 主要讲述少侠虹猫遵循父亲遗命，肩负拯救森林环境重任，含愤下山寻找其他六剑传人，最终凑齐七剑大败黑心虎的故事。

The animation was broadcast on CCTV Children's Channel on September 5, 2006, and won the "First Prize for Domestic Animation" at the 2006 Children's Programs and Animation Excellence Awards, and the "Best TV Animation Award" at the China Original Animation Awards Ceremony. 该动画于 2006 年 9 月 5 日在中央电视台少儿频道播出，曾获得 2006 年少儿节目及动画精品「国产动画片一等奖」、中国原创动漫大奖颁奖典礼「最佳电视动画大奖」。

item.title: 《星期三》第三季宣布开拍
item.description:
Recently, Netflix's hit series "Wednesday" officially announced the start of production for its third season, which is now officially underway near Dublin, Ireland. 近期，Netflix 热播剧《星期三》（Wednesday）第三季正式宣布开机，目前已在爱尔兰都柏林附近正式投入制作。

To maintain the global appeal of the IP and build a strong competitive barrier, Netflix is injecting fresh blood with strong market appeal into the third season. 为了维持该 IP 的全球吸引力并构建坚实的竞争壁垒，Netflix 正在为第三季注入极具市场号召力的新鲜血液。

In addition to the previously announced Eva Green, who will play the mysterious Aunt Ophelia, veteran Hollywood stars Winona Ryder, Chris Sarandon, and Noah Taylor, among other prominent actors, have also confirmed their participation. 除了早前宣布的伊娃·格林（Eva Green）将饰演神秘的奥菲莉亚阿姨外，好莱坞资深影星薇诺娜·瑞德（Winona Ryder）、克里斯·萨兰登（Chris Sarandon）以及诺亚·泰勒（Noah Taylor）等重磅演员也确认加盟。

Renowned director and executive producer Tim Burton continues to helm the project and expresses high anticipation for reuniting with these old friends and collaborators, which provides a strong guarantee for the series' quality and iconic gothic aesthetic. 著名导演兼执行制片人蒂姆·伯顿（Tim Burton）继续坐镇，并对与这些昔日老友及合作者的重聚表示高度期待，这为该剧的质量与标志性的哥特审美提供了强有力的保证。

早报
